message:
refactor(abi): remove host delegation from rpc_native macro

Sun RPC is a legacy subsystem. The rpc_native! macro previously tried
host delegation via resolve_host_symbol_raw before falling back to safe
defaults. Since the safe defaults are the correct behavior for this
legacy API, remove the host delegation entirely and return deterministic
safe values directly (0, null, no-op).

Eliminates 6 host delegations from rpc_abi.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
